rationale: Final metadata/config freeze is ready, but actual validated final submission artefacts are not materialized. Immediate Kaggle submission is not safe.

blocking_issues.open_gaps: family submission.csv files not materialized | validator reports pending
blocking_issues.recommended_action: Generate official family submissions from real test predictions and rerun release validation until release_ready=true.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: official retrieval evaluation not run in this workspace
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Run build_retrieval_index + evaluate_dense_retrieval on official items/queries.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: real dense model/index not materialized in workspace | public/OOF dense lift unknown
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Build real dense index with official items; compare dense_v1/v2 and BM25 overlap before final use.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: fold-aware negative rebuild not fully proven on official OOF
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Use fold-aware negative builds for final validation; inspect uncertain/skipped rates.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: semantic hard negative OOF gain unproven | false negative risk remains
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Keep dense hard negatives out of default unless ablation shows class0-safe lift.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: no official OOF metrics in workspace
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Run official OOF; keep tabular as baseline/family A backbone until CE proves lift.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: real transformer fine-tuning not run here | operational GPU/dependency risk
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Run GPU OOF with backend=transformers; compare against sklearn_text and tabular before final weighting.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: no ready OOF candidates, no prediction-correlation evidence
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Materialize OOF/test preds; reject highly correlated redundant blends.
Run splitter ablation on official data and track public/OOF correlation over submissions.
Complete official OOF ablations for selected final candidates.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: threshold stability not measured on real final OOF
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Use OOF global/stable midpoint; never tune directly to public LB.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: requires real OOF errors to populate final insights
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Run after first official OOF; inspect FP/FN class0-heavy segments.
Keep disabled unless late ablation proves safe; avoid final unproven pseudo labels.
Add public LB entries after every upload; do not over-infer under n<3.

acceptable_risks.open_gaps: full dry-run impossible without official data/test predictions
acceptable_risks.recommended_action: Run final dry-run after official artefacts arrive; archive command outputs.

required_actions_before_submission: Materialize family submission.csv files from official test predictions.
Run submission validator and ensure reports are present.
Re-run package_final_families.py and validate_final_release.py until release_ready=true.
Run at least one real OOF/ablation cycle on official data before trusting model-family decisions.
